stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Rat Trap Bond construction begins with proper site planning and foundation design.
stages.explanation: Rat Trap Bond construction begins with proper site planning and foundation design.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. Wall centerlines and corners are established for cavity alignment.
stages.explanation: Accurate setting out ensures correct cavity alignment throughout the structure.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation trenches are excavated to suitable bearing strata.
stages.explanation: Excavation reaches suitable bearing strata for safe load transfer.

stages.title: PCC and Footings
stages.narration: Stage 4. PCC blinding and reinforced concrete footings are constructed.
stages.explanation: Footings distribute structural loads safely into the ground.

stages.title: Foundation Masonry
stages.narration: Stage 5. Foundation masonry is built to support the superstructure.
stages.explanation: Foundation masonry supports the superstructure and transfers loads into the footing system.

stages.title: Plinth Band
stages.narration: Stage 6. The reinforced concrete plinth band is cast for structural continuity.
stages.explanation: Plinth bands improve structural continuity and control settlement effects.

stages.title: First Rat Trap Bond Course
stages.narration: Stage 7. Bricks are now being placed on edge to create the characteristic Rat Trap Bond cavity system. These cavities reduce material consumption while improving thermal insulation.
stages.explanation: Unlike conventional masonry, bricks are placed on edge creating internal air cavities.

stages.title: Wall Construction
stages.narration: Stage 8. Rat Trap Bond walls rise course by course with internal cavities maintained at corners.
stages.explanation: The cavity system reduces material consumption while maintaining structural performance.

stages.title: Seismic Reinforcement Option
stages.narration: Stage 9. Vertical reinforcement is placed through cavities and grouted for seismic resistance.
stages.explanation: Internal cavities allow easy integration of seismic reinforcement.

stages.title: Window and Door Openings
stages.narration: Stage 10. Door and window frames are installed with reinforcement around openings.
stages.explanation: Openings require strengthening because they interrupt normal load paths.

stages.title: Lintel Band
stages.narration: Stage 11. The reinforced lintel band is cast to tie walls together.
stages.explanation: Lintel bands tie walls together and improve earthquake performance.

stages.title: Roof Band
stages.narration: Stage 12. The roof-level ring beam is cast to create box action.
stages.explanation: Roof bands create box action behavior and improve lateral resistance.

stages.title: RCC Roof Slab
stages.narration: Stage 13. The reinforced roof slab is cast to distribute loads to the walls.
stages.explanation: The roof slab distributes loads uniformly throughout the structure.

stages.title: Damp Proof Course
stages.narration: Stage 14. The damp proof course and waterproof membrane are installed.
stages.explanation: The damp proof course prevents moisture migration into walls.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. Rat Trap Bond construction reduces brick and mortar usage while maintaining structural efficiency and improved thermal performance.
stages.explanation: Completed Rat Trap Bond resilient house ready for occupancy.

rat_trap_brick.title: Rat Trap Bond Brick
rat_trap_brick.orientation: Placed on edge to form load-bearing wythes and cavity boundaries.
rat_trap_brick.loadTransfer: Compression transferred through brick webs to foundation and bands.
rat_trap_brick.materialEfficiency: Approximately 25% fewer bricks than conventional stretcher bond.

air_cavity.title: Internal Air Cavity
air_cavity.thermalPerformance: Air pockets reduce conductive heat transfer through the wall.
air_cavity.weightReduction: Reduced masonry mass lowers seismic inertia.

seismic_reinforcement.title: Seismic Reinforcement
seismic_reinforcement.earthquakeResistance: Vertical bars grouted in cavities improve ductility and confinement.
seismic_reinforcement.rebarDetailing: Placed at corners and critical wall segments through RTB cavities.

plinth_band.title: RCC Plinth Band
plinth_band.structuralContinuity: Ties walls at base and improves load redistribution.

lintel_band.title: RCC Lintel Band
lintel_band.wallIntegration: Continuous tie beam integrates wall segments at opening level.
lintel_band.seismicProtection: Improves box action and reduces out-of-plane failure.
